Two clones analysis

library(lme4)
library(MASS)
library(ggplot2)
library(emmeans)
library(tidyverse)
library(glmmTMB)
library(car)
library(devtools)
library(cowplot)
library(broom.mixed)
library(brglm2)
WARP <- read.csv("/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/Lah_TransmissionProject_Dataset_25Apr25/WARP/WARP_table_oocyst_4Aug25_normalised_2clones.csv")

CTRP <- read.csv("/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/Lah_TransmissionProject_Dataset_25Apr25/CTRP/CTRP_table_oocyst_normalised_10Nov25.csv")


WARP <- WARP[ , 1:9]
CTRP <- CTRP[ , 1:9]

WARP$gene <- rep("WARP", length(WARP$name))
CTRP$gene <- rep("CTRP", length(CTRP$name))

CTRP <- subset(CTRP, background!="HB3")
CTRP <- subset(CTRP, clone!="bulk")

CTRP$RefMin <- ifelse(CTRP$allele == "D", "Ref", "Minor")
WARP$RefMin <- ifelse(WARP$allele == "F", "Ref", "Minor")

alldata <- rbind(CTRP, WARP)

Subset data and set as factors

alldata <- subset(alldata, clone!="3D7")
alldata <- subset(alldata, clone!="HB3")
alldata$background[alldata$background == "3D25"] <- "3D7"

alldata$clone<-as.factor(alldata$clone)
alldata$allele<-as.factor(alldata$allele)
alldata$rep<-as.factor(alldata$rep)
alldata$mosquito<-as.factor(alldata$mosquito)
alldata$RefMin <- factor(alldata$RefMin, levels = c("Ref","Minor"), ordered = TRUE)

summary(alldata$oocysts)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##  0.0000  0.0000  0.0000  0.6303  0.0000 22.0000
var(alldata$oocysts)
## [1] 2.718194
#alldata <- subset(alldata, mosquito!="An_alb")

alldata$oocyst_prev <- rep(0, length(alldata$name))
alldata[which(alldata$oocysts > 0), ]$oocyst_prev <- 1

alldata$mosq_allele <- interaction(alldata$mosquito,
                                           alldata$allele,
                                           sep = "_")

Plot graph from raw data

#noctrp <- subset(alldata, alldata$gene !="CTRP")
#noctrp <- subset(noctrp, noctrp$mosquito!="An_alb")


# The genes you want to loop over
genes_to_plot <- c("CTRP", "WARP")

# Make plots for each gene
plots <- lapply(genes_to_plot, function(g) {
  ggplot(data = filter(alldata, gene == g), aes(x = RefMin, y = oocysts)) + 
    geom_violin(size = 0.4) + 
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, aes(color = RefMin), size = 0.7, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, NA),
      oob = scales::oob_squish_any,  
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .05))
    ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c("Ref" = "Ref", "Minor" = "Min")
  ) +
    facet_grid(. ~ mosquito, labeller = labeller(
      mosquito = c(
        "An_gam"   = "gambiae",
        "An_steph" = "stephensi",
        "An_mini"  = "minimus",
        "An_alb"   = "albimanus"
      )
    )) + 
    theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
    theme(
      axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.3, linetype = "solid"), 
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"), 
      strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 3.5),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm")
    ) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("#E31A1C","#6A3D9A")) 
    #ggtitle(g)   # Add gene name as title
})
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## Warning: The `size` argument of `element_line()` is deprecated as of ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use the `linewidth` argument instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
###by clone
genes_to_plot <- c("CTRP", "WARP")

plots <- lapply(genes_to_plot, function(g) {
  # Set desired order & labels by gene (paired)
  if (g == "WARP") {
    lvl_order <- c("Ref E4", "Alt B8", "Ref E5", "Alt D6")
    allowed <- tibble(
      RefMin = c("Ref","Minor","Ref","Minor"),
      clone  = c("E4","B8","E5","D6"),
      label  = lvl_order
    )
  } else { # CTRP
    lvl_order <- c("Ref E2", "Alt G9", "Ref B5", "Alt E12")
    allowed <- tibble(
      RefMin = c("Ref","Minor","Ref","Minor"),
      clone  = c("E2","G9","B5","E12"),
      label  = lvl_order
    )
  }

  # Prepare data with paired x labels (Ref/Min included)
  dat <- alldata %>%
    filter(gene == g) %>%
    inner_join(allowed, by = c("RefMin","clone")) %>%     # keep only requested pairs
    mutate(xlab = factor(label, levels = lvl_order))      # enforce pair order

  ggplot(
    dat,
    aes(x = xlab, y = oocysts, color = clone)             # outline color by clone
  ) +
    geom_violin(
      size = 0.4,
      fill = NA,                                          # no fill; outline only
      scale = "width",
      trim = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      width = 0.2, height = 0.2,
      size = 0.7, alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, NA),
      oob = scales::oob_squish_any,
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .05))
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    facet_grid(. ~ mosquito, labeller = labeller(
      mosquito = c(
        "An_gam"   = "gambiae",
        "An_steph" = "stephensi",
        "An_mini"  = "minimus",
        "An_alb"   = "albimanus"
      )
    )) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
  E4  = "red",
  B8  = "purple",
  E5  = "salmon",
  D6  = "slateblue",
  E2  = "red",
  G9  = "purple",
  B5  = "salmon",
  E12 = "slateblue"
)) +
    theme(
      axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 8),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
      #axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",    # set to "right" if you want clone legend
      axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm")
    )
    # Optional: fix clone colors explicitly
    # + scale_color_manual(values = c(E4="#...", B8="#...", E5="#...", D6="#..."))
})

# Access a specific plot
plots[[1]]

plots[[2]]

#pdf("/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/plots/oocystsbyclone_20260326.pdf", width = 5, height = 5) #was 6 x5
#plot_grid(plotlist = plots, ncol = 1)
#dev.off()
###by clone
genes_to_plot <- c("CTRP", "WARP")

plots <- lapply(genes_to_plot, function(g) {
  # Set desired order & labels by gene (paired)
  if (g == "WARP") {
    lvl_order <- c("Ref E4", "Alt B8", "Ref E5", "Alt D6")
    allowed <- tibble(
      RefMin = c("Ref","Minor","Ref","Minor"),
      clone  = c("E4","B8","E5","D6"),
      label  = lvl_order
    )
  } else { # CTRP
    lvl_order <- c("Ref E2", "Alt G9", "Ref B5", "Alt E12")
    allowed <- tibble(
      RefMin = c("Ref","Minor","Ref","Minor"),
      clone  = c("E2","G9","B5","E12"),
      label  = lvl_order
    )
  }

  # Prepare data with paired x labels (Ref/Min included)
  dat <- alldata %>%
    filter(gene == g) %>%
    inner_join(allowed, by = c("RefMin","clone")) %>%     # keep only requested pairs
    mutate(xlab = factor(label, levels = lvl_order))      # enforce pair order

  ggplot(
    dat,
    aes(x = xlab, y = oocysts, color = clone)             # outline color by clone
  ) +
    geom_violin(
      size = 0.4,
      fill = NA,                                          # no fill; outline only
      scale = "width",
      trim = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      width = 0.2, height = 0.2,
      size = 0.7, alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, NA),
      oob = scales::oob_squish_any,
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .05))
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    facet_grid(. ~ mosquito, labeller = labeller(
      mosquito = c(
        "An_gam"   = "gambiae",
        "An_steph" = "stephensi",
        "An_mini"  = "minimus",
        "An_alb"   = "albimanus"
      )
    )) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
  E4  = "red",
  B8  = "purple",
  E5  = "salmon",
  D6  = "slateblue",
  E2  = "red",
  G9  = "purple",
  B5  = "salmon",
  E12 = "slateblue"
)) +
    theme(
      axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 8),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
      #axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",    # set to "right" if you want clone legend
      axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm")
    )
    # Optional: fix clone colors explicitly
    # + scale_color_manual(values = c(E4="#...", B8="#...", E5="#...", D6="#..."))
})

# Access a specific plot
plots[[1]]

plots[[2]]

For talk

###by clone
genes_to_plot <- c("CTRP", "WARP")

plots <- lapply(genes_to_plot, function(g) {
  # Set desired order & labels by gene (paired)
  if (g == "WARP") {
    lvl_order <- c("Ref E4", "Alt B8", "Ref E5", "Alt D6")
    allowed <- tibble(
      RefMin = c("Ref","Minor","Ref","Minor"),
      clone  = c("E4","B8","E5","D6"),
      label  = lvl_order
    )
  } else { # CTRP
    lvl_order <- c("Ref E2", "Alt G9", "Ref B5", "Alt E12")
    allowed <- tibble(
      RefMin = c("Ref","Minor","Ref","Minor"),
      clone  = c("E2","G9","B5","E12"),
      label  = lvl_order
    )
  }

  # Prepare data with paired x labels (Ref/Min included)
  dat <- alldata %>%
    filter(gene == g) %>%
    inner_join(allowed, by = c("RefMin","clone")) %>%     # keep only requested pairs
    mutate(xlab = factor(label, levels = lvl_order))      # enforce pair order

  ggplot(
    dat,
    aes(x = xlab, y = oocysts, color = clone)             # outline color by clone
  ) +
    geom_violin(
      size = 0.5,
      fill = NA,                                          # no fill; outline only
      scale = "width",
      trim = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      width = 0.2, height = 0.2,
      size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, NA),
      oob = scales::oob_squish_any,
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .05))
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    facet_grid(. ~ mosquito, labeller = labeller(
      mosquito = c(
        "An_gam"   = "gambiae",
        "An_steph" = "stephensi",
        "An_mini"  = "minimus",
        "An_alb"   = "albimanus"
      )
    )) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
  E4  = "red",
  B8  = "purple",
  E5  = "salmon",
  D6  = "slateblue",
  E2  = "red",
  G9  = "purple",
  B5  = "salmon",
  E12 = "slateblue"
)) +
    theme(
      axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.8),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
      #axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",    # set to "right" if you want clone legend
      axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm")
    )
    # Optional: fix clone colors explicitly
    # + scale_color_manual(values = c(E4="#...", B8="#...", E5="#...", D6="#..."))
})

# Access a specific plot
plots[[1]]

plots[[2]]

Calculate N and prop infected to place below raw data plots

prop_infected <- alldata %>%
  group_by(mosquito, gene, RefMin) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total      = n(),
    n_infected   = sum(oocyst_prev, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_infected = mean(oocyst_prev, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pct_infected = round(prop_infected * 100, 1)  # one decimal place
  )

prop_infected
#write.csv(prop_infected, file="/Users/virginiahowick/Documents/allelic_replacement/analysis/oocyst_prevs_20251021.csv")

Run oocyst prev models

df <- subset(alldata, gene == "WARP")
df$clone_group <- ifelse(df$clone %in% c("E5", "D6"),
                         "clone2",
                         "clone1")

mod_full <- glm(
  oocyst_prev ~ RefMin + clone_group + mosquito + RefMin:mosquito + RefMin:clone_group:mosquito,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = df,
  method = "brglmFit"
)

mod_noint <- glm(
  oocyst_prev ~ RefMin + clone_group + RefMin:mosquito,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = df,
  method = "brglmFit"
)

anova(mod_noint, mod_full, test = "LRT")
df <- droplevels(subset(alldata, gene == "CTRP"))
df <- droplevels(subset(df, mosquito != "An_mini"))

df$clone_group <- ifelse(df$clone %in% c("B5", "E12"),
                         "clone2",
                         "clone1")

  
mod_full <- glm(
  oocyst_prev ~ RefMin + clone_group + mosquito + RefMin:mosquito + RefMin:clone_group:mosquito,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = df,
  method = "brglmFit"
)

mod_noint <- glm(
  oocyst_prev ~ RefMin + clone_group + RefMin:mosquito,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = df,
  method = "brglmFit"
)

anova(mod_noint, mod_full, test = "LRT")

NOW do the same for intensity models

oocysts_nozeros <- subset(alldata, alldata$oocysts > 0)

df <- subset(oocysts_nozeros, gene == "WARP")
df$clone_group <- ifelse(df$clone %in% c("E5", "D6"),
                         "clone2",
                         "clone1")

mod_full <- glmmTMB(
    oocysts ~ RefMin + clone_group + mosquito + RefMin:mosquito + RefMin:clone_group:mosquito,
    family = nbinom2,
    data = df
  )
## dropping columns from rank-deficient conditional model: RefMinMinor:clone_groupclone2:mosquitoAn_steph
mod_noint <- glmmTMB(
    oocysts ~ RefMin + clone_group + mosquito + RefMin:mosquito,
    family = nbinom2,
    data = df
  )


anova(mod_noint, mod_full, test = "LRT")
df <- droplevels(subset(oocysts_nozeros, gene == "CTRP"))
df <- droplevels(subset(df, mosquito != "An_mini"))

df$clone_group <- ifelse(df$clone %in% c("B5", "E12"),
                         "clone2",
                         "clone1")


mod_full <- glmmTMB(
    oocysts ~ RefMin + clone_group + mosquito + RefMin:mosquito + RefMin:clone_group:mosquito,
    family = nbinom2,
    data = df
  )
## dropping columns from rank-deficient conditional model: RefMinMinor:clone_groupclone2:mosquitoAn_steph
mod_noint <- glmmTMB(
    oocysts ~ RefMin + clone_group + mosquito + RefMin:mosquito,
    family = nbinom2,
    data = df
  )


anova(mod_noint, mod_full, test = "LRT")
session_info()
